properties.name: HELPSTRING
properties.value:
Install the dependencies listed in your manifest:
    If this is off, you will have to manually install your dependencies.
    See https://github.com/microsoft/vcpkg/tree/master/docs/specifications/manifests.md for more info.

properties.name: HELPSTRING
properties.value: Use manifest mode, as opposed to classic mode.

properties.name: HELPSTRING
properties.value: Appends the vcpkg paths to CMAKE_PREFIX_PATH, CMAKE_LIBRARY_PATH and CMAKE_FIND_ROOT_PATH so that vcpkg libraries/packages are found after toolchain/system libraries/packages.

properties.name: HELPSTRING

properties.name: HELPSTRING
properties.value: (experimental) Add USES_TERMINAL to VCPKG_APPLOCAL_DEPS to force serialization.
